queries.list_modules: Contract module filenames in docs/contracts, excluding underscore-prefixed metadata files.
queries.list_mcp_tools_stable: MCP tool names whose contract status is stable or omitted.
queries.list_mcp_tools_unavailable: Module and capability IDs where MCP is explicitly unavailable.
queries.list_rest_routes: REST route paths documented by module capabilities.
queries.capabilities_by_auth: Module, capability ID, and auth level triples.
queries.tool_rest_map: MCP tool names mapped to their REST equivalents.
queries.rest_returns_map: REST route method/path entries mapped to documented return shapes.
queries.capabilities_no_rest: Module and capability IDs where REST is missing or unavailable.
queries.capabilities_planned: Module and capability IDs with planned REST or MCP surfaces.
queries.rules_by_module: Rule IDs grouped by contract module.
queries.model_fields: Prisma model fields for a selected source-of-truth model.
